links.title: Set time to race
links.tooltip: Set the time range to the selected race's 3-day window

0.text: Open loop due to insufficient engine temperature

1.text: Closed loop, using oxygen sensor feedback to determine fuel mix

2.text: Open loop due to engine load OR fuel cut due to deceleration

3.text: Open loop due to system failure

4.text: Closed loop, using at least one oxygen sensor but there is a fault in the feedback system

targets.query: SELECT mean("value") FROM "-Engine-RPM" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

panels.description:
Fuel system status is reported as 1 of 5 modes.
0 - Open loop due to insufficient engine temperature
1 - Closed loop, using oxygen sensor feedback to determine fuel mix
2 - Open loop due to engine load OR fuel cut due to deceleration
3 - Open loop due to system failure
4 - Closed loop, using at least one oxygen sensor but there is a fault in the feedback system
panels.title: Fuel System Status

list.name: raceid
list.label: Race
list.definition:
import "date"
import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: if "${__timezone}" == "utc" then "UTC" else "${__timezone}")
pad = (n) => if n < 10 then "0" + string(v: n) else string(v: n)
from(bucket: "races") |> range(start: 0) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "race" and r._field == "end_time_epoc") |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.race_name + " (" + pad(n: date.month(t: r._time)) + "/" + pad(n: date.monthDay(t: r._time)) + "/" + pad(n: date.year(t: r._time) % 100) + ");" + r.race_id})) |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

query.query:
import "date"
import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: if "${__timezone}" == "utc" then "UTC" else "${__timezone}")
pad = (n) => if n < 10 then "0" + string(v: n) else string(v: n)
from(bucket: "races") |> range(start: 0) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "race" and r._field == "end_time_epoc") |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.race_name + " (" + pad(n: date.month(t: r._time)) + "/" + pad(n: date.monthDay(t: r._time)) + "/" + pad(n: date.year(t: r._time) % 100) + ");" + r.race_id})) |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

list.name: race_from
list.definition: from(bucket: "races") |> range(start: 0) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "race" and r.race_id == "${raceid}" and r._field == "end_time_epoc") |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: string(v: int(v: uint(v: r._time)) / 1000000 - 3600000)})) |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

query.query: from(bucket: "races") |> range(start: 0) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "race" and r.race_id == "${raceid}" and r._field == "end_time_epoc") |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: string(v: int(v: uint(v: r._time)) / 1000000 - 3600000)})) |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

list.name: race_to
list.definition: from(bucket: "races") |> range(start: 0) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "race" and r.race_id == "${raceid}" and r._field == "end_time_epoc") |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: string(v: int(v: uint(v: r._time)) / 1000000 - 3600000 + 259200000)})) |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

query.query: from(bucket: "races") |> range(start: 0) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "race" and r.race_id == "${raceid}" and r._field == "end_time_epoc") |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: string(v: int(v: uint(v: r._time)) / 1000000 - 3600000 + 259200000)})) |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

list.definition: from(bucket: "laps") |> range(start: 0) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lap" and r.race_id == "${raceid}" and r._field == "lap_no") |> group(columns: ["car_number"]) |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_carnum: int(v: r.car_number), _value: r.car_number + " - " + r.competitor_name + ";" + r.car_number})) |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_carnum"]) |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
list.label: Competitor
list.name: carno

query.query: from(bucket: "laps") |> range(start: 0) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lap" and r.race_id == "${raceid}" and r._field == "lap_no") |> group(columns: ["car_number"]) |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_carnum: int(v: r.car_number), _value: r.car_number + " - " + r.competitor_name + ";" + r.car_number})) |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_carnum"]) |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
